title: HOT WEATHER INFORMATION - 211info
text: LINN COUNTY HEALTH SERVICES HOT WEATHER INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about local hot weather events. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Extreme Heat Advisories/Warnings If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
